Tests for the greater than or equal to (>=) operator with various data types in JavaScript.


## Files
- **[11.08.04-001.js](11.08.04-001.js.md)**: Tests the greater than or equal to (>=) operator with large numbers in JavaScript.
- **[11.08.04-002.js](11.08.04-002.js.md)**: Tests the greater than or equal to operator with floating-point numbers.
- **[11.08.04-003.js](11.08.04-003.js.md)**: Tests the greater than or equal to comparison between two strings in JavaScript.
- **[11.08.04-004.js](11.08.04-004.js.md)**: Tests string comparison using the greater than or equal operator in JavaScript.
- **[11.08.04-005.js](11.08.04-005.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the greater than or equal to operator with null and undefined values.
- **[11.08.04-006.js](11.08.04-006.js.md)**: Tests the comparison operation '>=' between boolean values in JavaScript.
- **[11.08.04-007.js](11.08.04-007.js.md)**: Tests the greater than or equal to operator with boolean values in JavaScript.
- **[11.08.04-008.js](11.08.04-008.js.md)**: Tests the greater than or equal to comparison between a number and a string.
- **[11.08.04-009.js](11.08.04-009.js.md)**: A test script that checks if one floating-point number is greater than or equal to another.
